description: Add sample metadata columns from a columnar payload.
usage: Use this to attach new metadata columns to the current samples or replace the current metadata set with uploaded values.

payloadFields.name: columnarMetadata
payloadFields.description: Metadata encoded in columnar form, aligned to the sample order.

payloadFields.name: attributeDefs
payloadFields.description: Optional attribute definitions for the incoming metadata columns. Use this to preserve attribute types, titles, scales, or other metadata settings instead of relying on inference.

payloadFields.name: replace
payloadFields.description: Whether to replace the current metadata set. If `true`, only the provided columns remain. If omitted or `false`, the provided columns are merged into the existing metadata.

description: Add a derived metadata column from a selected or aggregated attribute.
usage: Use this when an existing attribute should be materialized as sample metadata under a new column name.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute operated on by the action. Its current values are resolved before the reducer runs and then used by sorting, filtering, grouping, or metadata derivation.

payloadFields.name: name
payloadFields.description: Name of the derived metadata column. This becomes the leaf attribute name written into metadata. Prefer a short user-facing name.

payloadFields.name: groupPath
payloadFields.description: Optional metadata group path for the derived column. When provided, the resulting attribute is written under `groupPath/name`.

payloadFields.name: scale
payloadFields.description: Optional scale definition attached to the derived metadata column.

description: Import metadata columns from a configured source.
usage: Use this when one or more source-backed metadata columns should be added to the current sample collection.

payloadFields.name: sourceId
payloadFields.description: Configured metadata source to read from. Omit this only when exactly one source is available.

payloadFields.name: columnIds
payloadFields.description: Column ids to import from the selected source.

payloadFields.name: groupPath
payloadFields.description: Optional metadata group path override for the imported columns.

payloadFields.name: replace
payloadFields.description: Whether to replace the current metadata set. If `true`, only the imported columns remain. If omitted or `false`, the imported columns are merged into the existing metadata.

description: Sort samples in descending order by a selected attribute.
usage: Use this when samples should be ranked by one quantitative or ordinal attribute before further filtering or grouping.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute operated on by the action. Its current values are resolved before the reducer runs and then used by sorting, filtering, grouping, or metadata derivation.

description: Retain the first sample for each distinct value of a selected attribute.
usage: Use this when the current sample order already encodes the desired representative sample within each category and within each current group.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute operated on by the action. Its current values are resolved before the reducer runs and then used by sorting, filtering, grouping, or metadata derivation.

description: Retain samples whose value falls in the first n distinct categories in the current ordering.
usage: Use this when samples are already ordered by a ranking attribute and all samples belonging to the first n encountered categories should be kept within each current group.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute operated on by the action. Its current values are resolved before the reducer runs and then used by sorting, filtering, grouping, or metadata derivation.

payloadFields.name: n
payloadFields.description: Maximum number of distinct categories to retain. Categories are taken in first-seen order within each current group.

description: Retain samples whose selected quantitative value satisfies a threshold comparison.
usage: Use this for numeric filters such as values greater than, less than, or equal to a chosen threshold.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute operated on by the action. Its current values are resolved before the reducer runs and then used by sorting, filtering, grouping, or metadata derivation.

payloadFields.name: operator
payloadFields.description: Comparison applied as `attributeValue operator operand`.

payloadFields.name: operand
payloadFields.description: Numeric value on the right-hand side of the comparison.

description: Retain or remove samples whose selected attribute matches any of the provided values.
usage: Use this for exact-match filtering on categorical or ordinal attributes. Set `remove` to `true` to exclude matching samples instead of keeping them.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute operated on by the action. Its current values are resolved before the reducer runs and then used by sorting, filtering, grouping, or metadata derivation.

payloadFields.name: values
payloadFields.description: Attribute values matched by exact equality.

payloadFields.name: remove
payloadFields.description: Whether to remove matching samples instead of retaining them. If omitted or `false`, only matching samples are kept.

description: Remove samples whose selected attribute value is missing.
usage: Use this before later analysis steps when samples with `undefined` or `null` values should be excluded.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute operated on by the action. Its current values are resolved before the reducer runs and then used by sorting, filtering, grouping, or metadata derivation.

description: Group samples into named groups using an explicit mapping of attribute values.
usage: Use this when specific attribute values should be merged into custom named groups. Samples whose value is not listed in `groups` are not kept in the grouped result.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute operated on by the action. Its current values are resolved before the reducer runs and then used by sorting, filtering, grouping, or metadata derivation.

payloadFields.name: groups
payloadFields.description: Mapping from output group name to attribute values assigned to that group. Samples whose value is not listed in any group are omitted from the grouped result.

description: Group samples by the distinct values of a selected categorical attribute.
usage: Use this to stratify the current sample collection into one group per visible category. Group order follows the resolved attribute domain, and categories with no samples are omitted.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute operated on by the action. Its current values are resolved before the reducer runs and then used by sorting, filtering, grouping, or metadata derivation.

description: Group samples into quartile-based bins of a selected quantitative attribute.
usage: Use this for a quick quantitative stratification. Quartiles are computed from the current samples in each group using the R-7 method, and tied values may collapse adjacent quartiles.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute operated on by the action. Its current values are resolved before the reducer runs and then used by sorting, filtering, grouping, or metadata derivation.

description: Group samples into threshold-defined numeric intervals of a selected quantitative attribute.
usage: Use this when quantitative bins should follow explicit thresholds instead of quartiles. The resulting groups are ordered from the highest interval to the lowest.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute operated on by the action. Its current values are resolved before the reducer runs and then used by sorting, filtering, grouping, or metadata derivation.

payloadFields.name: thresholds
payloadFields.description: Thresholds used to stratify the samples. Supply these in ascending operand order. Adjacent thresholds define the output intervals.

description: Remove a previously created sample group by path.
usage: Use this to delete one visible group from the current grouping hierarchy. The path is relative to the implicit root group.

payloadFields.name: path
payloadFields.description: Group names from outermost to innermost, excluding the implicit ROOT.

description: Retain samples whose selected value appears in every current non-empty group.
usage: Use this for intersection-style cohort refinement after samples have already been split into groups. A value is kept only if it appears in every current non-empty group.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute whose values must be present in every current non-empty group.

description: Create or update a reactive selection or parameter value, including point selections, interval selections, and genomic-region selections.
usage: Use this for point selections, interval selections, genomic-region selections, and other replayable parameter changes.

payloadFields.name: selector
payloadFields.description: Structured selector for the parameter.

payloadFields.name: value
payloadFields.description: Serialized parameter value.

payloadFields.name: origin
payloadFields.description: Optional datum origin for replayable values.
